case_title: IMC FINANCIAL,LLC VS. GEORGE NASH et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-10-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-03-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARGARET DEL COTO, CSR #8493. (212)

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMC FINANCIAL,LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NASH, GEORGE INDIVIDUALLY DOES 1 TO 100,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-03-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-05-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-18-2003
